bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=energy-analyst Items: 2 · Forecasts emitted: 20 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-22 · [research_task] 分析中国战略库存与炼厂开工率的关系

DONE · owner=energy-analyst · research discussion=分析中国战略库存与炼厂开工率的关系 (led by energy-analyst)

卫星显示原油库存在霍尔木兹危机下依然持平，需结合炼厂利润率分析‘保库存、压产量’模式的持续性及其对全球成品油市场的溢出效应。

  • Outcome: research discussion "分析中国战略库存与炼厂开工率的关系" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 在10Y美债锚定5.0%的背景下，日元套息断裂将由日本国内无法承受高油价与162汇率而迫使BOJ恐慌加息触发。这会导致外资抛售亚洲AI资产回补日元，致使高度依赖外资的KRW与TWD面临资本流出，存在兑美元直冲1450与33.8的尾部贬值风险。 | → 20 forecast(s) on 600406.SH,300308.SZ,600089.SH,601179.SH,688981.SH, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 20 (0 positions); tickers: 600406.SH, 300308.SZ, 600089.SH, 601179.SH, 688981.SH, 688347.SH

2026-05-22 · [research_task] Verify QD connector bottlenecks in liquid cooling supply chain

DONE · owner=energy-analyst · research discussion=Verify QD connector bottlenecks in liquid cooling supply chain (led by energy-analyst)

Verify lead times for Quick Disconnect (QD) connectors and cold plate manifolds from Vertiv and Taiwanese leaders, and check for domestic dielectric fluid solutions, as requested in the follow-up section.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Verify QD connector bottlenecks in liquid cooling supply chain" → failed | cards=1 | error: D1_ERROR: Internal error in D1 DB storage caused object to be reset.
